title: ericoila aquatica
side_effects: Ericoila aquatica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions. In severe cases, it can cause respiratory distress, convulsions, and even organ failure if ingested in large quantities. Additionally, prolonged use of the plant may lead to interactions with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes. Improper use can also result in skin irritation, including rashes and itching.
